current_phase.label: Real Validation Rebuild and Model Portfolio Policy Research

current_milestone.label: Lock benchmark and label semantics, rebuild expanding-watchlist rolling validation, and evaluate simulation-only automatic holding policy artifacts

progress_summary: P-1/P0 professionalization tranche is implemented and published, with Phase 5 still gated by real sample accumulation. Launch gate '建议命中复盘覆盖' now dynamically reads improvement plan status from suggestion review snapshots: completed plans flip the gate to pass, accepted plans show a progress note with the control-plane task ID. Added 'completed' to suggestion statuses and a '标记完成' button in the audit desk. The remaining gates continue to compute status from runtime data. Operations review now prefetches `simulation_workspace` right after summary load, so the default governance-first entry no longer hides simulation-board state until the user manually opens `模拟参数`; this fix has been published to runtime and browser-verified on localhost plus the canonical route. The suggestion audit queue now hides `completed` items from the default list and exposes them only under an explicit `已完成` filter, so completed plan items no longer look stuck in queue. Data-quality improvement suggestions now aggregate same degraded-source signatures into one batch root-cause item while preserving per-symbol evidence refs, so repeated `financial_data_stale` / `profile_incomplete` warnings no longer flood the diff review queue. Existing suggestion review snapshots are now grouped on read too, so the diff review page no longer needs to wait for a full dual-model re-audit before collapsing repeated data-quality warnings.
blockers: Full browser-side member acceptance is still not closed. The canonical root session clearly shows the account selector and lists real member spaces (`amoeba`, `member-a`), but Safari automation still did not reliably complete the dropdown selection interaction. The served member blank-state is therefore verified through real canonical edge/API responses with a signed root session plus `X-Ashare-Act-As-Login`, rather than an end-to-end browser click path.

Validation manifests and portfolio backtests have now been rebuilt on the real database under the expanding-watchlist join-date-forward benchmark contract, but replay artifacts still cannot materialize on current real data because none of the active-watchlist recommendations yet have a full 20-trading-day forward review window. The replay builder bug that previously hard-coded `records[1]` is fixed, so this is now a data-window blocker rather than a rebuild-path blocker.

The simulation model track now has a concrete `phase5_simulation_topk_equal_weight_v1` research-candidate target-weight policy, the live runtime database has a durable `phase5_holding_policy_study` snapshot, and the published refresh path no longer stalls at zero-step sessions or one-cycle pending rebuilds: the latest live refresh has already lifted holding-policy to `9portfolios` with `excluded_reasons={}`, `mean_turnover=0.037037`, `mean_invested_ratio=0.079822`, `mean_active_position_count=0.444444`, and `mean_annualized_excess_return_after_baseline_cost=0.000581`. However, the policy still remains non-promotable. `mean_rebalance_interval_days` is still missing because all live rebalance evidence still sits on the same trading date, `mean_invested_ratio` and `mean_active_position_count` remain weak even after four real order events, and horizon artifacts are still narrow at `3` symbols / `2` as-of dates while `002270.SZ` continues to look like a `20d/40d` instability outlier. The active blocker is therefore no longer missing runtime artifact wiring, a dead simulation evidence path, or same-run rebuild lag, but insufficient multi-date / multi-rebalance breadth to prove that the repaired validation path and newer producer contract materially improve primary-horizon selection and holding-policy credibility on real runtime data.
next_step: Accumulate enough as_of dates, forward benchmark bars, and rebalance breadth before horizon approval, holding-policy promotion, or production weight changes; keep the plan-pool handoff targeting the local control-plane backend unless a separate architecture decision explicitly redefines `/middle` as the task authority.

latest_findings.title: Active in Phase 5: validation/portfolio artifacts are now rebuilt on the real database under the expanding-watchlist join-date-forward benchmark contract, while replay remains blocked on insufficient 20-trading-day forward history even after fixing same-day replay candidate selection
Resolved on 2026-04-25: main signal contract no longer represents manual review as a scored LLM factor; it is now an explicit non-scoring manual review layer with legacy compat only
Resolved on 2026-04-25: benchmark path and replay artifacts now use active-watchlist equal-weight proxy instead of synthetic demo paths

Active in Phase 5: the real-db `phase5_holding_policy_study` snapshot and redesign experiments still indicate a diagnostic-only state rather than a promotable policy. The runtime artifact-resolution bug that had been forcing `0portfolios` is now fixed, and the latest runtime refresh includes `3` portfolios; however, the gate still remains `draft_gate_insufficient_evidence` because deployment / position-count evidence is still too weak, and horizon evidence still only spans `3` symbols / `2` as-of dates.

Resolved on 2026-04-26: the authenticated canonical route `/projects/ashare-dashboard/` serves the same runtime bundle as local preview; the earlier timeout came from the local proxy path, not a server-side outage

Resolved on 2026-04-26: refreshed authenticated browser acceptance on the canonical route now passes for `单票分析 / 运营复盘 / 设置`, with fresh captures showing the previously blocking migration-state wording, internal contract fields, phase labels, and runtime enums removed from the live UI

Resolved on 2026-04-26: the operations-review `用户轨道 / 模型轨道` table-overflow regression is now published and rechecked on the live canonical route after login, with containment kept inside each track card instead of relying on repo-only fixes

Resolved on 2026-04-26: the operations focus workspace now keeps K-line data available via daily fallback, limits row-click behavior to simulation focus updates instead of whole-page refresh, keeps default watch-symbol membership synced to the active watchlist, and allows beta-write users to create/execute manual research requests without an operator-only block
Resolved on 2026-04-26: default builtin manual-research execution now uses the local Codex CLI with `gpt-5.5` when no model API key is selected, instead of leaving a queued placeholder request

Resolved on 2026-04-26: manual-research-related frontend calls no longer fail at the old 10-second timeout threshold; the canonical live route now keeps builtin Codex execution alive past that window and returns a real receipt instead of surfacing `请求超时（>10s）`

Resolved on 2026-04-26: manual-research request serialization now hydrates current validation artifacts before stale detection, so completed reviews are no longer falsely rendered as `结果过期` when raw `historical_validation` payload fields are empty

Resolved on 2026-04-27: public direction claims on the live dashboard are now gated by artifact-backed validation status, sample coverage, and minimal evidence thresholds, so under-validated symbols are downgraded to `watch` or `risk_alert` instead of exposing raw model direction as the user-facing conclusion

Resolved on 2026-04-27: the live dashboard no longer exposes placeholder fusion-layer copy, raw degrade tokens, or internal Phase-2 explanatory text in recommendation evidence; user-visible explanations are now normalized into readable research language across producer, service hydration, and frontend fallbacks

Resolved on 2026-04-27: same-`as_of_data_time` late stale backfills no longer override fresher effective recommendation versions across dashboard, replay, simulation, and manual-research consumers; the live route now preserves current trigger explanations without letting `market_data_stale` reruns mechanically rewrite the same snapshot

Resolved on 2026-04-27: runtime Phase 5 research-data drift no longer blocks professionalism assessment. The runtime DB now rebuilds through `phase5-daily-refresh --analysis-only`, local plus canonical Safari verification shows artifact-backed `research_candidate / observe_only` summaries, and the later holding-policy artifact-resolution fix has moved runtime evidence from the false `0portfolios` state to `3` included portfolios. This remains non-promotional because deployment-quality evidence and horizon breadth are still too thin.

Resolved on 2026-04-27: Phase 5 historical validation no longer leaks future exit bars beyond each recommendation `as_of_data_time`; repo research rebuilds now show `40d` as the dominant horizon after removing those invalid observations, and the published runtime/canonical routes continue to serve the repaired validation path.

Resolved on 2026-04-27: the canonical route was no longer stale because a dead `com.codex.project-tunnel.ashare-dashboard` LaunchAgent and zombie remote forwards on ports `3101/4101` were cleared; after restarting the tunnel, Safari canonical verification again matched the live runtime with `002028.SZ` and `最近分析 04/27 19:58`.

Resolved on 2026-04-27: Phase 5 holding-policy runtime study no longer misclassifies live auto-model portfolios as all-missing artifacts when payload `backtest_artifact_id` pointers lag behind the actual `sim-*` portfolio keys. After publishing the fallback lookup and refreshing the runtime DB, holding-policy advanced from `0portfolios` to `3` included portfolios, while release parity also stopped false-failing on second-level `data_latency_seconds` drift.

Resolved on 2026-04-27: runtime `phase5-daily-refresh` no longer generates empty zero-step model sessions. The published refresh path now auto-steps the restarted simulation once, live runtime evidence has produced real `model_decision + order_filled` events, and holding-policy has advanced to a `6portfolios` artifact with non-zero turnover / exposure metrics while localhost and canonical Chrome both show `最近刷新 04/27 21:01` for `002028.SZ`.

Resolved on 2026-04-27: the same-run runtime rebuild path now carries the newest stepped model portfolio into the live holding-policy study immediately, and Phase 5 live verification now explicitly targets the runtime database instead of the repo-local SQLite copy. A fresh runtime refresh advanced the study to `phase5-holding-policy-study:auto_model:2026-04-27:9portfolios`, with Safari localhost/canonical both showing `最近刷新 04/27 21:48` and `最近分析 04/27 21:46` for `002028.SZ`.

Resolved on 2026-04-27: operations-review model holdings no longer lag behind the latest filled action when the session clock is newer than the freshest `5min` market bar. Portfolio replay now anchors to `simulation_session.last_data_time`, so the live localhost/canonical `运营复盘` page shows the same `600522.SH / 中天科技 / 1000 股` holding that already existed in runtime `simulation_events`, `paper_orders`, and `paper_fills`.

Resolved on 2026-04-27: live operations-review copy no longer repeats the same validation/governance warning across multiple panels, post-close freshness no longer shows raw seconds, and governance track labels now read `用户轨道 / 模型轨道` on the canonical page.

Resolved on 2026-04-27: the live follow-up prompt for `002028.SZ` no longer front-loads the system recommendation as the answer scaffold; it now forces fact-vs-inference separation, requires explicit explanation of validation-metric conflicts, and has been verified live after publish while the latest manual-research receipt was simultaneously confirmed as a successful DeepSeek (`deepseek-v4-pro`) execution.

Resolved on 2026-04-28: DeepSeek follow-up failures for `600522.SH` were traced to the OpenAI-compatible transport's 30-second read timeout rather than a broken request flow or a proxy misroute. Local reproduction showed the default proxied path completes while explicit no-proxy still times out on this machine, and the published 75-second timeout now lets the same live follow-up complete successfully.

Resolved on 2026-04-28: the canonical stock-dashboard route was not down at the app layer; localhost runtime stayed healthy while the public tunnel had fallen back into a stale remote-port condition on `3101/4101`. Clearing the old remote forward and restarting `com.codex.project-tunnel.ashare-dashboard` restored the tunnel, while unauthenticated canonical requests continue to redirect to the shared login wall by design.

Resolved on 2026-04-28: intraday market refresh and simulation stepping no longer depend on opening the frontend. The published backend now runs a trading-session background tick, keeps active-watchlist `5min` bars moving, and advances the running simulation session to each newly landed market bar without restarting the session.

Resolved on 2026-04-28: candidate/self-select returns no longer render with reversed gain/loss colors, and `运营复盘` now exposes an in-place `分析报告` action so operators can open a compact stock analysis modal directly from either track table.

Resolved on 2026-04-28: manual-research follow-up request views no longer borrow another request's completed LLM result. Queued requests now stay request-scoped until they execute, and a fresh live `600522.SH` request was verified first in queued form and then through a successful `200 OK` execution without reproducing the old `404 Not Found` path.

Resolved on 2026-04-29: dashboard homepage and operations page returned 500 Internal Server Error after schema split. Root cause: `from __future__ import annotations` + TYPE_CHECKING imports prevented Pydantic v2.13 from resolving cross-module types. Fixed by per-file dependency analysis: removed future annotations where safe, and used __init__.py namespace injection + model_rebuild() for the stock↔simulation↔operations circular chain.

Resolved on 2026-04-29: operations workspace intermittently showed '403 Forbidden' with no actionable message. Three-layer fix: (1) VPS proxy JSON error key changed from `error` to `detail` so frontend extracts the Chinese message; (2) backend env explicitly set ASHARE_BETA_ACCESS_MODE=open; (3) access.py future annotations removed.

Resolved on 2026-04-29: 5-minute market data only refreshed when frontend was open. Created `com.codex.ashare-dashboard.scheduled-refresh` LaunchAgent (StartInterval=300); extended market-hour window to 09:31/13:01; added AKShare trading-day check with daily cache to skip holidays.

Resolved on 2026-04-29: SSH tunnel to VPS failed to recover after restart because `buildRemoteCleanupScript()` generated bash with syntax errors (`do;`/`then;`). Fixed by replacing .join('; ') with string concatenation; added bash -n test; added auto-reconnect loop with exponential backoff (1s→60s) and 5-retry cleanup.

Resolved on 2026-04-29: mobile homepage candidate trend charts were not visible because the candidate list API did not expose daily `price_chart` data, and the first publish attempt exposed a stock schema import cycle. Candidate responses now include real daily chart payloads, the schema cycle is fixed with TYPE_CHECKING-only cross-module imports plus a plain candidate chart payload type, and localhost/canonical mobile browser checks confirm four ECharts canvas mini trends render on candidate cards.

Resolved on 2026-04-30: AI follow-up LLM prompt restructured to remove internal plumbing (artifact_id, manifest_id, source_uri) and add market data, recent news, validation benchmarks, and evidence snippets. Also implemented Phase 1 event-driven deep analysis with six trigger conditions, external data fetching via AKShare, and CLI/API integration.

Resolved on 2026-05-01: P-1/P0 professionalization is repo-implemented, published to local runtime, and verified on the served browser route. Runtime operations now loads summary first, lazy-loads details, and exposes data-quality, CSI benchmark, true factor IC scaffolding, lightweight operations summary/details, and product-facing data-quality/factor-validation fields. P1 horizon approval and production weight changes remain blocked on sample accumulation and operator approval.

Resolved on 2026-05-01: professionalization closeout now passes the full required flow. `ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN` is sourced from the backend env file for verifier use without recording the secret, `pytest -q` passes 212 tests, deploy verification passes 19/19 checks against the published runtime, and headless Chrome confirms the served dashboard renders `工作台 / 关注股票 / 复盘` with zero console errors.

Resolved on 2026-05-01: improvement suggestion plan-pool acceptance now creates a control-plane Plan task after model selection. The stock dashboard persists the returned control task id, model, and plan-mode metadata; task-momlkmg7-4mrd59 was created in the control plane and is blocked on plan_feedback pending user review.
